zh.lifeSummary: 當Bethoc of Scotland於1080年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親King Donald Bane III, of Scotland48歲，母親Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth40歲。她於大約1100年與Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1160年享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bethoc of Scotland于1080年出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲King Donald Bane III, of Scotland48岁，母亲Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth40岁。她于大约1100年与Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1160年享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Scotland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Scotland, Scolland. Found in Normandy as well as England, it evidently denoted a Scot or someone with an association with Scotland.
ethnic name for someone from Scotland, from Middle English Scotlond ‘Scotland’. Compare England .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

en.lifeSummary: When Bethoc of Scotland was born in 1080, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, King Donald Bane III, of Scotland, was 48 and her mother, Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth, was 40. She married Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale about 1100, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1160, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bethoc of Scotland est née en 1080, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, King Donald Bane III, of Scotland, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale environ 1100, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1160, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bethoc of Scotland 1080 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Donald Bane III, of Scotland 48 und ihre Mutter Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth 40. Sie hat um 1100 in Schottland, United Kingdom Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1160 im Alter von 81 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bethoc of Scotland è nata il nel 1080 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, King Donald Bane III, of Scotland, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale circa 1100, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1160, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bethoc of Scotlandが1080年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父King Donald Bane III, of Scotlandは48歳，母Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perthは40歳であった。約1100年にイギリススコットランドでUchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1160年に81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bethoc of Scotland(이)가 1080년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Donald Bane III, of Scotland(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1100년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bethoc of Scotland nasceu em 1080, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, King Donald Bane III, of Scotland, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale aproximadamente 1100, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1160, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bethoc of Scotland родилась в 1080 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени King Donald Bane III, of Scotland было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale около 1100 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1160 г. в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bethoc of Scotland nació en 1080, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, King Donald Bane III, of Scotland, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale aproximadamente 1100, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1160, a la edad de 81 años.
